overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban industrial district. The character moves from an open street into a covered parking area, then continues along sidewalks past graffiti-covered buildings and crosses an intersection. The scene features a mix of industrial concrete structures and futuristic high-rises under clear morning sunlight.

events.description: entering covered parking structure beneath concrete overpass
moving from bright sunlight into deep shadow of concrete garage

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering a covered parking structure beneath a multi-level concrete garage

entered.detail: multi-level concrete parking garage with open levels and visible cars inside
tall industrial chimney with red and white stripes emitting smoke
elevated industrial pipe walkway connecting buildings across the street
small yellow industrial structure with metal roll-up doors
white sedan parked near the garage entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in an open industrial area with a large concrete parking structure on the left and a tall smokestack in the distance. The camera moves forward and turns left, entering a covered parking garage entrance. The lighting shifts from bright natural sunlight to deep shadow as the camera moves under the concrete overpass.

events.description: exiting covered parking area back into open street with full sky visibility
turning right to follow the sidewalk along graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered structure and walking along a sidewalk next to graffiti-covered industrial buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art tags
tall modern street lamp with glowing orange light
tall futuristic towers with spires and antennas visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered parking area back into bright sunlight, revealing a sidewalk lined with graffiti-covered walls. The camera turns right and continues along the street, with futuristic skyscrapers becoming visible in the distance. A pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction.

events.description: passing pedestrians walking in opposite direction on the narrow sidewalk
approaching commercial area with green neon signage and storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the sidewalk passing various pedestrians and storefronts with green neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and blue pants walking toward the camera
pedestrian in brown coat walking past the camera

entered.detail: commercial buildings with glowing green neon signs and metal shutters
orange rusted metal barricades and construction barriers on the sidewalk
futuristic overhead street lighting poles spanning the road

segments.scene_description: The camera continues down a commercial sidewalk lined with buildings featuring green neon signage and rusted metal barriers. Several pedestrians walk past, including one in a white shirt and blue pants. The futuristic skyscrapers in the distance grow larger as the camera approaches the city center.

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection using the marked crosswalk
turning right at the street corner near the Goldsmith street sign

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at an intersection and turning right at the corner, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: character with distinctive red mohawk and white crop top walking alongside
silver sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: street sign reading 'Goldsmith' mounted on a pole at the corner
elevated pedestrian walkway with glass sides crossing over the street
modern glass and steel office building with reflective windows
marked pedestrian crosswalk lines on the asphalt road

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a busy urban intersection, crossing the street via a marked crosswalk. A street sign reading 'Goldsmith' is visible as the camera turns right at the corner. The scene includes moderate pedestrian traffic including a person with a red mohawk, a silver sedan driving through, and modern glass buildings. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the street in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stark industrial zone into the dense, vibrant heart of a futuristic city center. It begins in an open area beside a concrete parking structure and a distant smokestack, moving forward and turning left to enter a covered garage where the bright sunlight abruptly shifts into deep shadow. As the camera exits the overpass back into the light, the environment transforms into a street lined with graffiti-covered walls and distant skyscrapers, passing a lone pedestrian before continuing along a commercial sidewalk marked by green neon signs and rusted barriers. The scene then expands as the skyscrapers grow larger and more imposing, leading the camera toward a busy urban intersection. Finally, the movement crosses a marked crosswalk past a Goldsmith street sign and a person with a red mohawk, turning right toward modern glass buildings and an overhead pedestrian bridge.
